privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real, publicly-available PCAP file (http.cap) from the official Wireshark wiki containing 43 packets, of which 4 are HTTP-layer packets (2 GET requests and 2 200 OK responses). The file is a legitimate sample capture from 2004 showing a web browsing session to www.ethereal.com and Google's ad server. The expected CSV output format uses comma separation with quoted fields, matching the tshark output format with the -E quote=d option. The expected header and field ordering are correctly specified in metadata. The data is not synthetic; it is a real historical packet capture from the Wireshark project.
